calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2002 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2002 Continued To Dec-30-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 14,2002
Off Calendar Nov-15-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Default Prove-Up. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heald. William Marion Duncan, Esq. represented the Plaintiff. Default entered against Norgate Marine, S.A.; Norgate Marine Service and Sea Chart Marine Inc. Richard G. Murphy, Vice President, of Risk Management, was sworn and examined. The Court having heard evidence and good cause appearing grants judgment for the plaintiff in the amount of $192,660.92. Order signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2002 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-18-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2002 Continued To Oct-04-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
